title: Syncing JIRA "Linked Issues" to Monday
excerpt:

posts.author: djpreece (Darrell Preece)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using the JIRA integration to import JIRA issues into Monday. I would like to get the list of Linked Issues into a column in Monday. I can’t find the right column type that will work.

In JIRA, a query clearly shows/allows “Linked Issues” column selection and the resulting table in JIRA shows the list of JIRA IDs (actually clickable links).

The Monday integration specification also shows “Linked Issues” as a source field but I’m unable to find a column type (text, long text, etc) that will work

Really appreciate any help and guidance!

Darrell

posts.author: jennbaum (jennifer baum)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having the same issue. I have a different board where it automatically created the jira issue column and imported the Jira ID into that column. I created a new board and was trying to do something similar and it no longer works.
I think it worked using the old deprecated jira integration. Now I am using the jira app - and it no longer works.

posts.author: haim.ateya (Haim)
posts.cookedHtml: hello, is there any update on this topic?
